acceptance_criteria.description: TypeScript compiles with no errors after adding graph.ts
Graph utilities are pure functions with no side effects, suitable for reuse by both impl-doc and atomic-task validators
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify that graph.ts exports buildAdjacencyList() and detectCycles() as pure functions with no file I/O, no mutable shared state, and generic enough signatures to work with any string-keyed dependency graph (not coupled to ImplDefinition or AtomicTaskDefinition). Verify functions are well-typed with explicit return types. Verdict: PASS if both functions are pure, generic, and reusable; FAIL if they contain side effects, are coupled to specific domain types, or lack explicit return types.
